SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_MONPP_COPAY_DAILY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2013. Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. 
The MOPP are currently referred to as standard mail order pharmacies within split networks. There is 
no change in the meaning
